name: model__prediction__generic__timesfm
description: Generic time-series forecast model using Google TimesFM 2.5, a 200M-parameter foundation model applied zero-shot. Reads any parquet with a leading x column and arbitrary y columns; forecasts each y series independently with point + 10th/90th percentile predictions.

additionalProperty.name: history_length
additionalProperty.description: Number of rows to use as model context. Window ends at total_rows - prediction_offset.

additionalProperty.name: prediction_length
additionalProperty.description: Number of steps to forecast ahead. Maximum: 512.

additionalProperty.name: prediction_offset
additionalProperty.description: Rows to skip at the end before the history window. Use for back-testing against known data.
